playernotes.midnightconfig.title: General
playernotes.midnightconfig.editTablist: Display prefix in front of player name in tablist, if the player has notes?
playernotes.midnightconfig.showPrefixFor: Show this prefix for yourself as well?
playernotes.midnightconfig.changeTabOrde: Put players with notes on top of the tablist?

playernotes.gui.title: Player Note Lists
playernotes.gui.edit.title: Edit List:
playernotes.gui.label.priority_hint: Priority: Prefix smaller=behind, Suffix smaller=in front
playernotes.gui.help.format_intro: Use & instead of § for formatting codes:
playernotes.gui.help.wiki: For more details, see Minecraft Wiki: Formatting codes
playernotes.gui.help.suffix: Suffix: Displayed after player name, same format as prefix
playernotes.gui.help.priority: Priority: Smaller prefix numbers appear later, smaller suffix numbers appear first
playernotes.gui.help.reset_code: Reset Code: When checked, automatically adds §r at the end to clear formatting
playernotes.gui.message.player_not_found: Player '%s' not found or not online.

playernotes.gui.confirm.delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete '%s'? This cannot be undone.
